title: Specimen → specimen (core)
notes:
Synthea emits no Specimen, so this branch is exercised only by synthetic cases. The standalone Specimen edge (mapspec/etl/Specimen__specimen.sql + mapspec/views/Specimen__specimen.view.json) emits one OMOP `specimen` row per FHIR Specimen, gated by `WHERE v.collection.collectedDateTime IS NOT NULL`.

Column derivation:
  specimen_id              = referenceToId(Specimen.id)  (surrogate PK, omitted from assertions)
  person_id                = referenceToId(Specimen.subject.getReferenceKey())
  specimen_concept_id      = std.concept_id  (SNOMED type.coding code --Maps to--> standard Specimen-domain concept), else 0
  specimen_type_concept_id = 32856  ('Lab', constant)
  specimen_date            = collection.collectedDateTime::date
  specimen_datetime        = collection.collectedDateTime::timestamp  (WALL-CLOCK; any FHIR offset is dropped by ::timestamp)
  quantity                 = collection.quantity.value
  anatomic_site_concept_id = site_std.concept_id  (SNOMED collection.bodySite code --Maps to--> any standard concept), else 0
  specimen_source_value    = left(SNOMED type code, 50)
  anatomic_site_source_value = left(SNOMED bodySite code, 50)
  unit_concept_id, disease_status_concept_id, specimen_source_id, unit_source_value, disease_status_source_value = NULL (always)

GROUNDED concepts (live vocab.concept / Maps-to, v20260227):
  type   SNOMED 119297000 'Blood specimen' --Maps to--> 4001225 'Blood specimen' (domain Specimen, standard 'S')
  site   SNOMED 368208006 'Left upper arm structure' --Maps to--> 4283159 'Left upper arm structure' (domain Spec Anatomic Site, standard 'S')
Each maps 1:1, so no surrogate-id fan-out.

cases.desc: (a) Specimen with collectedDateTime + SNOMED type + bodySite + quantity → one specimen row; type 119297000→4001225, site 368208006→4283159
(b) Specimen with NO collection.collectedDateTime → dropped by WHERE v.collected_dt IS NOT NULL, zero rows
